domain_positive_desc: This path is consistent with known-good triage practice.
domain_negative_desc: Negative walkthroughs are rejected examples — paths known to be incorrect. RPNI uses them as constraints to ensure the automaton never accepts these sequences.
domain_alphabet_note: Each row is one symbol in the domain alphabet. The symbol is the action:data pair — Category and Description are metadata only and do not affect automaton learning.
domain_meta_desc: The non-terminal (DFA state) symbols used in the grammar. Rename any state; its key updates in the Visualization immediately. The Role is structural and cannot be changed.
